title: SiTime Q3 2024 Earnings - 62% Revenue Growth Drives Strong Beat
text: SiTime reported 62% year-over-year revenue growth to $57.7 million for Q3 2024. The company significantly exceeded expectations with quarterly earnings of $0.40 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.26 per share. Net Income was $9.6 million, representing 17% of revenue or $0.40 per share. Pre-earnings expectations had consensus estimates for Q3 2024 revenue of $55.08 million and earnings expected at -$0.88 per share. Each customer segment and region continued at least double-digit growth with CED (communications, enterprise and data center), Greater China, and EMEA all growing at triple-digits. This marked a significant inflection point with accelerating growth trajectories.
